title: Benchmark gate
description: Run the shipped benchmark in JSON mode and persist its report for the release bundle.
input: Build if needed, run `armature bench --json`, and require a passing benchmark score.
command: bash -lc 'REPO_ROOT=${PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}; cd "$REPO_ROOT"; bash agent-eval/scripts/prepare-fast-gate.sh >/dev/null; mkdir -p "$ARMATURE_EVAL_RUN_DIR/artifacts"; node dist/bin/armature.js bench --json | tee "$ARMATURE_EVAL_RUN_DIR/artifacts/gate-bench.json"'
